title: Truthful worker and bot startup port reuse/conflict
acceptanceCriteria: Repro evidence exists for the pre-fix worker raw EADDRINUSE path and the pre-fix bot occupied-port startup behavior.
Worker no longer emits a raw Node EADDRINUSE stack trace on the expected occupied-port path.
Worker distinguishes free port, same-service reuse, different HappyTG service conflict, and foreign-process conflict with actionable logs.
Worker does not silently change ports and preserves HAPPYTG_WORKER_PORT / PORT semantics.
Bot expected behavior is proven from code/docs/tests before any startup fix is applied.
Bot now follows the same truthful reuse-vs-conflict model without starting duplicate delivery work on reuse.
Regression coverage exists for the changed startup paths and the proof bundle is complete.
